reviews.review_description:
Best physics VR game for stress relief!
Review: I absolutely love Crazy Punch! It is hands-down the most satisfying VR interaction I’ve had on my Meta Quest 3. The ragdoll physics are hilarious—watching the goofy dummies fly around never gets old. It's the perfect casual VR game to blow off steam after a long day. Highly recommend if you want a good laugh!

This is such a funny VR game. I love that it has two modes: the level-based challenges are actually clever physics puzzles, but Endless Mode is where I go to just go wild. The haptic feedback makes every punch feel impactful. If you’re looking for a standalone VR title that’s easy to pick up and play, this is a 5-star win.

As the description says, it's not about punching, it's all about shooting punches and knocking down dolls in various ridiculous poses.
There's no puzzle, and you don't have to think deeply.
It's perfect when you want to spend time without any thinking about it for a while.

This is hilarious. Punch everyone.

For now I went to level 59. That one is a difficult one.
Played several levels but had to go.... like it so far and looking forward to playing some more
